should_fix: Verify each tool's current free-tier limits before publish (caps change); limits labeled 'as observed'.
nice_to_have: Add internal link from the future Pillar 2 (best AI writing tools) once it exists.
Consider a small comparison table of the free options by 'free type'.

notes.seo_editor: Intent match full. Differentiates via the three-kinds-of-free taxonomy (the SERP gap), covers the real entities with real limits, internal-links to B2. Title concise; description ~175 chars, tightened below.
notes.copyright_risk_reviewer: Low. Tool names used nominatively/factually; no copied copy; 'free unlimited' framed honestly. Affiliate disclosure present at top.

metadata.title: Best Free AI Writing Tools for Novelists (2026)
metadata.description: The best free AI writing tools for novelists — plus what 'free' really means (free tier vs BYO-key), with real limits for RaptorWrite, Squibler, Inkfluence AI and Claude.
